IMPORTANT CHARTS 129
Vedic literature and he will hold a high position in that sphere.
Jupiter, Master oflife forces, is in Aquarius. The native will have an at
tractive body perfect in shape and his complexion will be fair. Saturn is
placed in Pisces. There is exchange of places between Saturn and Jupiter.
Therefore, the native will be interested in doing noble deeds (satwic karma)
both religious and cultural.
